"use client"; import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; export default function BusinessOverviewPage() { const [mounted, setMounted] = useState(false); const [isScrolled, setIsScrolled] = useState(false); // ROI Calculator States const [monthlyOrders, setMonthlyOrders] = useState(15000); const [errorRate, setErrorRate] = useState(2.5); // percentage const [penaltyFee, setPenaltyFee] = useState(15); // average cost per penalty / cancelation const [laborHours, setLaborHours] = useState(45); // hours spent manually updating inventory/orders // Synchronization Pipeline Toggle State const [activePipeline, setActivePipeline] = useState<'stock' | 'order'>('stock'); useEffect(() => { setMounted(true); const handleScroll = () => { if (window.scrollY > 20) { setIsScrolled(true); } else { setIsScrolled(false); } }; window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); return () => window.removeEventListener('scroll', handleScroll); }, []); // ROI Calculations const penaltiesSaved = Math.round(monthlyOrders * (errorRate / 100) * penaltyFee); const laborSavedVal = Math.round(laborHours * 30); // Estimating $30/hour operations labor cost const totalSavings = penaltiesSaved + laborSavedVal; const subscriptionCost = 249; // $249 / month enterprise subscription const roiPercentage = Math.round(((totalSavings - subscriptionCost) / subscriptionCost) * 100); return (

BUSINESS STRATEGY & ROI

Maximize Yield.
Eliminate Overselling.

OmniSync bridges the gap between digital sales frontends and WMS inventory realities. Protect your marketplace ratings, capture operational margins, and scale without friction.

Calculate Your ROI Explore Use Cases
{/* Stakeholder Metrics Summary */}
Financial Impact Summary

0% Cancellation Rates

Real-time stock synchronization eliminates overselling and subsequent platform listing penalties.

90% Faster Recovery

Isolated Dead Letter Queues (DLQ) allow operations staff to recover failed sync events inside seconds.

Unified Channels

Add new Shopee, Lazada, or TikTok Shop integrations on-the-fly without changing backend architecture.

{/* Use Cases Section */}

Designed for Enterprise Scale

Real-world operational challenges solved by OmniSync’s high-throughput architecture.

Flash Sales

Double-Digit Campaigns

During peak shopping events (11.11, 12.12), transaction volumes spike by 10x. OmniSync’s BullMQ architecture queues webhook events to absorb traffic spikes, throttling calls safely to avoid marketplace rate bans while maintaining under-2-second sync latency.

Throttling Protection Spike Absorption
3PL & Logistics

Multi-Warehouse Routing

Coordinate physical inventories located across distributed hubs. Whenever stock moves, adjustments are instantly verified and balanced across online storefront listings, preventing disjointed catalog states and overselling disputes.

Distributed Inventory ERP Sync
Operations

Rapid Business Scaling

Seamlessly expand storefront footprints. Adding new Lazada outlets, secondary TikTok Shops, or localized Shopee hubs requires zero custom code. Enable secure OAuth tokens inside the admin dashboard to extend coverage instantly.

Zero Custom Code Encrypted OAuth

{/* Before vs After Section */}

Operational Workflow Transformation

A direct comparison of traditional warehousing headaches vs. OmniSync’s automated event stream.

Without OmniSync

Manual Chaos & Delays

  • 1

    Periodic Stock Take

    Warehouse staff manually audit physical listings and export spreadsheets periodically.

  • 2

    Manual File Uploads

    Operations upload CSV sheets separately to Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop portals.

  • 3

    Silent Stockouts & Mismatches

    Unsynchronized listings lead to overselling during sales spikes, prompting heavy penalty disputes.

  • 4

    Difficult Resolution

    Failures are undocumented, requiring tedious database reconstruction and customer refunds.

With OmniSync

Automated Event Orchestration

  • 1

    Barcode Adjustments

    Barcode scans instantly trigger database inventory updates inside physical warehouses.

  • 2

    BullMQ Queue Broker

    OmniSync captures adjustments and streams events asynchronously to the outbound queue broker.

  • 3

    Dynamic Rate Shaper

    Queue workers shapes API dispatches to fully comply with Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop request quotas.

  • 4

    Protected DLQ & Recovers

    Failed callbacks isolate inside the central controller dashboard for immediate, single-click manual recovery.

{/* Synchronization Pipelines Visual */}

OmniSync Core Pipelines

Understand how data moves securely between physical stocks and storefront platforms.

➔

Customer Purchase

➔
2

Secure Webhook Ingestion

Fastify backend captures incoming webhooks, validates signatures, and checks idempotency filters.

➔
3

Reliable Worker Execution

Queue workers validate variant mapping, log transitions, and resolve sync payloads securely.

➔
4

WMS Order Generation

Order is safely committed to the central WMS database for physical picking and packing operations.

)}

INFO [Inventory Sync] Dispatching updates to [Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop]...
SUCCESS [Inventory Sync] Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop successfully synced.
{/* Problem & Solution Statement */}

Bridging The Operational Gap

Why major warehouses trust OmniSync for multi-channel commerce execution.

The Chaos

Disjointed Operations

  • Overselling & Stockouts: Delayed updates lead to negative reviews and penalizations.
  • API Quota Limits: Direct loops exhaust API quotas causing webhook synchronization blackouts.
  • Silent Failures: Lost webhook payloads from marketplaces without retry queues.
The Solution

Real-Time Event Automation

  • Instant Sync Updates: Less than 2s latency for inventory adjustment dispatches.
  • Persistent Queuing: Powered by BullMQ & Redis for durable order event storage.
  • DLQ Auto-Recovery: Failed updates isolate inside DLQ with options for manual retry.
{/* Feature Highlights */}

Core System Architecture Features

Engineered for absolute reliability, security, and extreme high throughput.

Live Inventory Sync

Real-time webhook and scheduler tracking dispatches local WMS stock updates directly to multi-channel stores instantly.

Automatic Order Pull

Captures orders immediately upon purchase across all endpoints, standardizing customer, item, and variant details to WMS.

Rate Limiting & Quotas

Enforces API quota management to protect connections, throttling calls cleanly based on marketplace limits.

DLQ & Failed Recovery

Isolates problematic updates. The operations staff can retry payloads manually via dashboard once corrected.

Live Fail Notifications

Instant visual and auditory notifications on the controller dashboard for failed webhooks or connection drops.

Audit Logging & Security

Tracks administrator actions and event adjustments for full transparency, protected under NestJS token encryption.

{/* Supported Marketplaces */}

Supported Commerce Channels

Plug-and-play connections with industry leaders. Zero additional code needed.

Shopee

LIVE & SYNCED

Supports auto order retrieval, stock mapping, and refresh tokens.

Lazada

LIVE & SYNCED

Full inventory callback webhooks with optimized rate throttling.

TikTok Shop

LIVE & SYNCED

Real-time purchase notification streams integrated natively.

{/* Architecture Overview */}

Under The Hood Architecture

Designed as an asynchronous, event-driven ecosystem optimized for data integrity.

1. Marketplaces
Shopee / Lazada / TikTok Shop
▼ Webhooks & API
2. Webhook Queue
BullMQ + Redis Event Broker
▼ Asynchronous Stream
3. Core Server
NestJS Controller + TypeORM + DLQ
▼ State Dispatcher
4. Client Console
Next.js Operations Dashboard
{/* Benefits Metrics Section */}

Measurable Platform Benefits

Real numbers driving commercial success for modern warehousing hubs.

99.99%
Synchronization Accuracy

Virtually zero inventory mismatches across Shopee, Lazada, and TikTok Shop channels.

< 2.0s
Sync Processing Latency

Immediate event dispatches from local change detection straight to online marketplace fronts.

100%
Failure Protection

Failed callbacks are persistent in PostgreSQL DLQ tables to safeguard against message losses.

10x
Operations Speedup

Replaces manual listing checks with a single autonomous central dashboard manager.

{/* Call to Action Footer */}

Ready to Synchronize Your Operations?

Get started today with our secure, enterprise-ready multi-channel sync manager portal.
